description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the pivotalpa/angular-cli Docker image. Add a deploy_master job that runs only on the master branch and the 11-setup-continuous-deployment branch. In its script, update Alpine packages and install lftp, cd into saturna-frontend, run npm install and ng build, write the current commit SHA ($CI_COMMIT_SHA) to $LOCAL_DIR/hash.txt, configure lftp to ignore SSL verification, echo a login message, and finally use lftp to mirror $LOCAL_DIR to $REMOTE_DIR on $HOST with the $USERNAME and $PASSWORD credentials. The job runs in the default stage and references the environment variables $LOCAL_DIR, $REMOTE_DIR, $USERNAME, $PASSWORD, $HOST and $CI_COMMIT_SHA.
